---
engine: julia
julia:
  env:
    - "JULIA_PYTHONCALL_EXE=@venv"
    - "JULIA_CONDAPKG_BACKEND=Null"
    - "PYTHONPATH=../../../.."
    - "NO_COLOR=1"
---

```{julia}
import PythonCall
```

```{python}
import sys
from pathlib import Path

repo_root = next(
    path
    for path in (Path.cwd(), *Path.cwd().parents)
    if (path / "books" / "assets" / "reading_lab_display.py").is_file()
)
if str(repo_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(repo_root))

from books.assets.reading_lab_display import display
```

# 四个基本空间

## 4 Subspaces

A is m × n

- Column space $C(A)$ in $\mathbb{R}^m$
- Null space $N(A)$ in $\mathbb{R}^n$
- Row space $C(A^T)$ in $\mathbb{R}^n$
- Null space of $A^T$ $N(A^T)$ in $\mathbb{R}^m$

  | 空间                | 属于哪里        | 维度由谁决定 |
  | ------------------- | --------------- | ------------ |
  | 列空间 \(C(A)\)     | \(\mathbb R^m\) | rank \(r\)   |
  | 零空间 \(N(A)\)     | \(\mathbb R^n\) | \(n-r\)      |
  | 行空间 \(C(A^T)\)   | \(\mathbb R^n\) | rank \(r\)   |
  | 左零空间 \(N(A^T)\) | \(\mathbb R^m\) | \(m-r\)      |

[m*n 中零空间的维度是谁决定的？](../appendices/10.qmd#mn-中零空间的维度是谁决定的)

```{python}
#| output: asis

from sympy import Matrix
from books.assets.reading_lab_display import display

A = Matrix([
    [1, 2, 3],
    [1, 2, 3],
    [2, 5, 8],
])

display("rank", A.rank())
display("A.columnspace", *A.columnspace())
display("A.nullspace", *A.nullspace())
display("A.rowspace", *A.rowspace())
display("A.left_nullspace", *A.T.nullspace())
```
```{python}
#| output: asis

from sympy import Matrix
from books.assets.reading_lab_display import display

A = Matrix([
    [1, 2, 3, 1],
    [1, 1, 2, 1],
    [1, 2, 3, 1],
])
R, _ = A.rref()
C_A = A.columnspace()
C_R = R.columnspace()
N_A = A.nullspace()
R_A = A.rowspace()
R_R = R.rowspace()
N_R = R.nullspace()

display("rank", A.rank())
display("rref", R)

display("A.columnspace/C(A)/basis of A", *C_A)
display("R.columnspace/R(C(A))/basis of R", *C_R)
display("C(A)!=C(R)", C_A == C_R)

display("A.rowspace", *R_A)
display("R.rowspace", *R_R)
display("A的行空间==R的行空间？", R_A == R_R)

display("A.nullspace", *N_A)
display("R.nullspace", *N_R)

display("A.left_nullspace", *A.T.nullspace())
```

[是不是行线性相关就肯定列也线性相关？](../appendices/10.qmd#是不是行线性相关就肯定列也线性相关)

[代码解析](../appendices/10.qmd#代码解析)

[这四个空间有啥用啊？](../appendices/10.qmd#这四个空间有啥用啊)

$$A^T y=0$$

[这四个空间有啥用啊？](../appendices/10.qmd#这四个空间有啥用啊)

被称为左零空间的原因：

$$\Rightarrow [y^T][A]=[0]$$

[y 的位置怎么变了](../appendices/10.qmd#y-的位置怎么变了)

$$
\operatorname{rref}\left[\begin{array}{c|c}
A_{m\times n} & I_{m\times m}
\end{array}\right]
\longrightarrow
\left[\begin{array}{c|c}
R_{m\times n} & E_{m\times m}
\end{array}\right]
$$

[这个 I 的作用就是记录变换步骤？](../appendices/10.qmd#这个-i-的作用就是记录变换步骤)

$$
E \left[\begin{array}{c|c} A_{m\times n} & I_{m\times m} \end{array}\right]
\longrightarrow
\left[\begin{array}{c|c} R_{m\times n} & E_{m\times m} \end{array}\right]
$$

[E 是什么意思，怎么又变成这样了？](../appendices/10.qmd#e-是什么意思怎么又变成这样了)

$$EA=R$$

In chapter 2, R is I.
Then E was $A^{-1}$.

[E 是怎么看来着？](../appendices/10.qmd#e-是怎么看来着)

```{julia}
using RowEchelon, Latexify, LinearAlgebra

A = [
    1 2 3 1
    1 1 2 1
    1 2 3 1
]

I3 = Matrix(I, 3, 3)

AI = [A I3]

R = copy(AI)
R[2, :] .-= R[1, :]
R[3, :] .-= R[1, :]
R[2, :] .*= -1
R[1, :] .-= 2R[2, :]
display(latexify(R))
```

[julia 和 sympy 有直接求 E 的函数吗？](../appendices/10.qmd#julia-和-sympy-有直接求-e-的函数吗)

```{python}
#| output: asis

from books.assets.reading_lab_display import display
from sympy import Matrix, eye

A = Matrix([
    [1, 2, 3, 1],
    [1, 1, 2, 1],
    [1, 2, 3, 1],
])

R, E = A.rref_rhs(eye(A.rows))

display(R)
display(E)
display(E * A)
display(E * A == R)
```

[rref_rhs 是什么？](../appendices/10.qmd#rref_rhs-是什么)

[E 就是 y 吗？还是$y^T$?](../appendices/10.qmd#e-就是-y-吗还是yt)

[那左零空间的基就是 E 里的 m-r 里的行？](../appendices/10.qmd#那左零空间的基就是-e-里的-m-r-里的行)

[这些行不一定是都在下面的，也可能是散着的？否！](../appendices/10.qmd#这些行不一定是都在下面的也可能是散着的)
